scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern is correct: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active+all_agents_idle. Filtering by app name is correct per gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Gold standard lists 'error=jubilant.any_error' but agent uses 'jubilant.any_blocked' and lists 'jubilant.all_error' — these predicates are not confirmed. The 'delay' parameter for juju.wait() is not in the gold standard API description and may be hallucinated. Detailed status attribute paths (unit.workload_status.current, unit.juju_status.current, unit.address) are unverified. The deploy() parameter list (app=, channel=, revision=, to=) goes well beyond what the gold standard confirms.
